name: apartment-manager
description: An apartment management system designed to use free-tier AWS services to manage apartments, tenants, and maintenance requests.
author: Craig R. Hughes <craig.git@rungie.com>

scripts.coverage: bun test && genhtml coverage/lcov.info --output-directory coverage --header-title 'Coverage report' --footer "$(git id)" --legend --sort --show-owners all --annotate-script "$(brew --prefix)/Cellar/lcov/*/share/lcov/support-scripts/gitblame.pm" --version-script "$(brew --prefix)/Cellar/lcov/*/share/lcov/support-scripts/gitversion.pm" --ignore-errors version,version --ignore-errors package,package --hierarchical --criteria-script "$(brew --prefix)/Cellar/lcov/*/share/lcov/support-scripts/criteria.pm" --show-navigation --show-proportion --num-spaces 4 --function-coverage --branch-coverage ; open coverage/index.html
scripts.postversion: git commit -m "Bump package version to $npm_package_version" package.json; git flow release start $npm_package_version; git flow release finish -m $npm_package_version $npm_package_version; git checkout develop; git merge master
scripts.test: eslint --fix;tsc;op run --env-file=.env -- bunx sst shell bun test;bunx astro check
scripts.test-only: op run --env-file=.env -- bunx sst shell -- bun test
